overall.description: A first-person walk along a desert highway shoulder in GTA V, transitioning from a treed section to a commercial area with a 24/7 supermarket, then to an industrial zone. Vehicles regularly pass on the multi-lane highway to the left under clear midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway shoulder with wooden fence

notable_agents.action: semi-truck driving past on the highway
sedan driving away in the distance

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt highway with white lane markings and metal guardrail
brown wooden post fence running along the dirt shoulder
scattered desert trees and shrubs behind the fence
large blank billboard beside the highway
arid rocky hills and mountains in the background

segments.scene_description: Walking along a desert highway shoulder with a wooden fence and scattered trees on the right. Vehicles pass regularly on the multi-lane highway to the left, with arid mountains visible in the distance under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway commercial area with convenience store

events.description: wooden fence ends and 24/7 supermarket sign becomes visible ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder approaching the 24/7 supermarket

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking a truck on the highway

entered.detail: convenience store with green and orange signage and blue roof
tall metal electricity pylon with multiple power lines

segments.scene_description: The wooden fence and trees give way to a commercial area featuring a 24/7 supermarket on the right. A large power transmission tower dominates the right side of the frame as the camera approaches the convenience store.

events.description: passing the 24/7 supermarket, metal guardrail begins along the shoulder
red delivery truck with 'eCola' branding passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking past the commercial area into a more industrial stretch with guardrail

notable_agents.action: red eCola delivery truck driving past on the highway

entered.detail: silver metal highway guardrail with wooden posts along the shoulder
low industrial structure with blue roof and beige walls

segments.scene_description: Passing the 24/7 supermarket, the scene transitions to an industrial area with a metal guardrail running along the right shoulder. A red eCola delivery truck passes on the highway as the camera continues walking past industrial buildings and power lines.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a desert highway shoulder that transitions from a rural landscape into a commercial and industrial zone. It begins beside a wooden fence and scattered trees with arid mountains visible under a clear blue sky, while vehicles pass regularly on the multi-lane highway to the left. As the camera moves forward, the greenery gives way to a commercial area featuring a 24/7 supermarket and a towering power transmission tower that dominates the right side of the frame. The scene then shifts past the convenience store toward an industrial area, where the wooden fence is replaced by a metal guardrail. Finally, the camera continues past industrial buildings and power lines as a red eCola delivery truck speeds by on the adjacent highway.
